_about: Per-operation perf budgets in nanoseconds for the Rust implementation. measured = `cargo bench --bench hot_path -- --quick` parsed via scripts/parse_criterion.py. baseline_ns is the median (criterion's middle estimate) on the listed CI runner; tolerance_multiplier sets the budget = baseline_ns * tolerance_multiplier. All three OS buckets fully seeded as of CI run on commit b31a2ac.
